title: EQ - Custom EQ, save a custom EQ, change some values, Reset EQ
scenario: Reset EQ button should restore sliders to default positions and remove saved custom EQ profile
steps: Save a custom EQ profile with some values.
Change some of the EQ values from the saved profile.
expected: The EQ slider positions should return to the default positions (middle of the slider), and the saved custom positions should be removed.
